CONTENT.Club career: Alastra is a youth product from Palermo. He made his Serie A debut on 14 February 2016 against Torino, replacing Stefano Sorrentino after 38 minutes of a 1–3 away defeat.On 30 January 2020, he joined Pescara on loan until the end of the season.After appearing on the bench for Parma in the first two games of the 2020–21 Serie A season, on 5 October 2020 he returned to Pescara on another loan.On 10 July 2021, he signed with Foggia.On 25 August 2022, Alastra joined Potenza on a one-year contract.
CONTENT.International career: On 25 April 2018, Alastra played a friendly match with Italy U20 against Croatia U20.

SUMMARY: Fabrizio Alastra (born 1 October 1997) is an Italian footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Serie C Group C club Potenza.
